title: Kraken launches crypto debit card in UK and Europe
snippet: Kraken has introduced a Mastercard debit card in the UK and Europe that lets users spend hundreds of crypto and cash currencies.

title: Hyundai completes USDT treasury settlement pilot between US and Mexico
snippet: Hyundai completed a proof-of-concept using Tether's USDT to settle a cross-border treasury transfer between its US and Mexican subsidiaries, highlighting growing enterprise interest in stablecoin-based payments.

title: Robinhood Chain draws over $3 billion in weekly DEX volume to join top five chains: Bernstein
snippet: Robinhood Chain hit $3.1B in weekly DEX volume and 65K users since its July 1 launch, as the Layer 2 eyes tokenized markets, Bernstein said.

title: Japan stablecoin payments advance with Lawson trial, Netstars launch
